allow: Read, Edit, Write, Glob, Grep are safe for all project files
Bash commands for node scripts, git status/log/diff/add/commit, ls, wc, mkdir, chmod, npm, npx
All MCP tool calls for discord, supermemory, playwright, context7
soft_deny: git push — confirm branch and commit count before pushing
clasp push — always show pre-flight (changed files, branch, uncommitted changes)
rm commands — verify target path before deleting
git merge/rebase/checkout/switch — confirm current state first
Any command that writes to Simulation_Ledger or production Google Sheets
environment: This is GodWorld — a city simulation engine with a newsroom pipeline
675 citizens in Simulation_Ledger — destructive sheet operations risk data loss
Service account credentials in credentials/ — never read or expose
.env contains API keys — never read or expose
bay-tribune Supermemory container is agent-facing canon — never write system internals to it
Agent files (.claude/agents/) must never contain simulation/engine/builder references
